'''Givin language''' was the native language of the [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] species from planet [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]].<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

The [[Givin script]] incorporated hundreds of mathematical symbols,<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" /> requiring a great deal of calculus to be read.

{{Language-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''
